sos.fabHint: SOS safety guidance for Vietnamese users worldwide — hold to confirm.
sos.guideSubtitle: Stay calm. Choose the right emergency path.
sos.guideAiNote: AI assistance is pilot-only and requires setup.
sos.locationGuidanceDetail: Your location can help show the right local emergency options after you confirm permissions.
sos.routingSetupBody: Call your local emergency number directly if you are in immediate danger.
sos.emergencyRowSub: Use your local emergency number if you are in immediate danger.
sos.embassySub: Find official help for your country or region.
sos.sheetEmbassySub: Find official help for your country or region.
sos.trustedContactRowSub: Prepare to contact someone you trust.
sos.trustedContactBody: Trusted contact alerts are planned for SOS Plus anywhere you travel — not live in this build. Add contacts in SOS Plus profile when available.
sos.footerDisclaimer: VIONA SOS does not replace local emergency services. If you are in immediate danger, call your local emergency number directly.
sos.subtitle: Stay calm. Help is available.
sos.gpsShareDetail: Your location can help show the right local emergency options after you confirm permissions.
sos.gpsUnavailable: Location permission is off or unavailable. You can still follow the guidance below.
sos.coordsLocked: Coordinates are not shown in this build.
sos.coordsA11y: Location details are not displayed here.
sos.reportScamSub: Prepare a scam report with optional location context.
sos.callFailedBody: Dial your local emergency number on your phone.
sos.reportQueuedBody: Your note was recorded locally. No live safety queue or dispatch.
sos.reportNoteBody: A local reference was saved on this device. This is not a live report to authorities or a guaranteed response.
sos.fabHoldHint: Press and hold for three seconds to open the emergency shield.
sos.plusTagline: SOS Plus is a global emergency companion layer for Vietnamese people abroad and travelers.
sos.learnBasicVsPlusA11y: Open SOS Basic and SOS Plus comparison
sos.basicTierBody: Included entry to VIONA’s global Vietnamese safety layer: in-app emergency guidance after sign-in, tuned to your current country or region when routing exists. Hold-to-confirm reduces accidental taps. Does not replace calling your local emergency number.
sos.plusTierBody: Planned subscription (€4.99/month) for a deeper companion layer when consent flows, engineering, and regional policies are ready. Not available for purchase in this build.
sos.capVoiceKeywords: Voice keyword hints after activation (e.g. “Cứu”, “Cháy”, “Cướp”, “Help”) — not live listening today
sos.capLocationGuidance: Local emergency guidance by current country or region (informational)
sos.disclaimerNotReplacement: VIONA SOS does not replace local emergency services.
sos.disclaimerUiOnly: This screen is informational only. Automated dispatch, keyword activation, recording, and subscription billing are not enabled in this build.
sos.disclaimer: Emergency calling and recording require user setup, device permissions, and regional availability. VIONA SOS does not replace local emergency services.
sos.preLoginBody: Open SOS from here before sign-in for calm guidance and the safety gate. Full in-app emergency tools unlock after login. This path does not place a call.
sos.preLoginGateSub: Use this screen without signing in — for Vietnamese users worldwide. Review the guidance, optionally read Basic vs Plus, then hold to acknowledge. No call is placed and your location is not sent from this gate alone.
sos.preLoginHoldHelper: Hold 3 seconds to acknowledge. No call is placed.
sos.gateSub: Hold for 3 seconds to continue to the in-app emergency sheet. No automatic dispatch or guaranteed response.
sos.legacyModalHoldSeconds: Press and hold for 3 seconds to confirm
sos.legacyModalLocationFallback: Location-aware routing is not configured in this build.
sos.legacyEmbassyAlertBody: Consulate numbers vary by country. Use your government travel advisory or official embassy directory — VIONA does not dial on your behalf here.
sos.legacyEmergencyAlertBody: Call your local emergency number directly if you are in immediate danger.

sosPlus.profileDisabled: This screen is disabled by configuration.
sosPlus.stubBanner: Entitlement: local device stub only — not Stripe and not server billing truth.
sosPlus.preparesCopy: SOS Plus will surface staged emergency-assist tools only when legally configured and enabled — not active in this build.
sosPlus.openProfileA11y: Open SOS Plus profile and consent settings
sosPlus.planFreeHint: Safety entry included. Paid upgrade will require billing when available.
sosPlus.simulatePlusSub: Device-only UI preview. Does not unlock paid rights or emergency automation.
sosPlus.trustedContactsHint: Stored on this device until encrypted sync exists. Maximum three.
sosPlus.consentLocationSub: For future contextual guidance only after explicit prompts — not dispatch.
sosPlus.consentAudioSub: Consent for future in-session audio after SOS activation — not active in this build.
sosPlus.consentVideoSub: Consent for future camera use after SOS activation — not active in this build.
sosPlus.consentTrustedAlertSub: Future notifications to your contacts — no outbound automation today.
sosPlus.consentEmergencyCallSub: Future assisted dialing or routing — no automatic police/fire/ambulance calling today.
sosPlus.legalBody: You understand VIONA SOS does not replace local emergency services, capabilities are staged, and fees may apply once billing is connected.
sosPlus.userIdAnonymous: Not signed in — data stays on this device.
sosPlus.savedLocally: Saved on this device only (no subscription API in this phase).

checkout.confirmedSub: You’re secured. The merchant sees this booking on their Live Order Radar instantly.

home.profileRoleGateTitle: Upgrade your account to earn VIO Credits

home.profileRoleGateMerchantBody: Merchants earn VIO Credits on inbound tourism bookings. Connect your shop, manage your menu, and get paid in one wallet.
home.charityBody: Every transaction helps bring meals and classes to children in need in Vietnam.

leonaPrefill.taxi: Ride assist request (demo): help call or message a driver about pickup and fare. VIONA does not book or pay for rides in this build.
leonaPrefill.transit: Transit assist (demo): help ask stations or operators about tickets and routes. VIONA does not buy tickets in app.
leonaPrefill.shopping: Shopping assist (demo): help call a store about returns or orders. VIONA does not pay on your behalf in app.

b2bPaywallUi.subThreat: Your trial window is ending soon. You can upgrade to keep automation features (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.chooseLane: Choose a plan for your business
b2bPaywallUi.trapPendingSync: Syncing merchant profile dates from VIONA for the 90-day cycle — refresh your business account.
b2bPaywallUi.trapGate: After day {{cap}}: Priority placement ended — VIO Credits restore featured placement and AI reception.
b2bPaywallUi.trapEnforcementVio: Featured placement paused until VIO Credits top-up.
b2bPaywallUi.metricCopy: Demo display: {{amount}} in bookings processed on the platform. Upgrade when you want to keep automation.
b2bPaywallUi.tier1Body: Metered voice, SMS, and booking events. Best when volume shifts — top up VIO Credits and scale down anytime (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.tier2Sub: Full-stack automation, data tooling, and VIP retention (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.tier2Feat2: VIP profiles, history, and retention signals
b2bPaywallUi.cancelBody: Cancel anytime. Access continues through your paid period — no extra retention steps.
b2bPaywallUi.cancelA11y: Cancel SaaS Elite subscription at end of billing period
b2bPaywallUi.tier3Body: B2B wholesale volume — lowest headline take for merchants on VIONA’s verified trade lane (qualifying SKUs; see merchant ops team).
b2bPaywallUi.tier3Hint: Stack with Tier 1 or 2 for AI + voice
b2bPaywallUi.legalHint: Renews monthly until cancelled. Taxes may apply. VIONA B2B terms apply.
b2bPaywallUi.alertCancelNoMerchant: Missing merchant id — sign in again or sync your profile.

disclaimers.defaultLite: AI supports intake and draft requests. Merchant confirmation is required. No legal, medical, or financial final advice. No payment or booking finalization in this demo path.
disclaimers.aestheticsConsultationOnly: Consultation scheduling only. No treatment advice, no medical outcomes, and no procedure booking as final via AI without human approval.
disclaimers.retailLead: Lead and pickup scheduling only. Inventory and pricing changes are not performed by AI in this phase.
disclaimers.stayTravelLeadOrConfirm: Availability and lead capture only unless merchant policy explicitly allows confirmed holds. No payment capture via AI here.
disclaimers.homeServicesEstimate: Site visit / estimate scheduling only. No guaranteed quotes or structural sign-off via AI.
disclaimers.professionalSchedulingOnly: Scheduling and intake only. No legal, tax, immigration, or insurance advice as a final professional opinion.
disclaimers.educationScheduling: Class or enrollment scheduling intake only. No guarantee of placement or certification via AI.
disclaimers.healthSchedulingOnly: Appointment scheduling intake only. No symptom diagnosis, triage as medical advice, prescriptions, or emergency handling via AI.

_generic.transcriptCustomer: Hello, I would like to ask about {{service}} and available times.
_generic.transcriptAi: Thanks — I captured a draft request for the merchant team. This is a local simulator only.
_generic.transcriptConfirm: Nothing is finalized until the merchant confirms in their workflow.
_generic.transcriptFallback: If the slot is busy, staff can propose alternatives during review.
_generic.aiDraftResponse: Draft intake prepared — pending merchant confirmation (simulator).

setup.industrySectionBody: Select the vertical that best matches your business. This choice is stored on this device for this session only — it is not sent to VIONA servers until you submit a pilot request with consent.
setup.industryNoneBody: Pick an industry to see the intake playbook and safety disclaimer for Lễ Tân AI.
setup.badgePilotOn: Pilot: open for evaluation (manual ops only)
setup.badgeProductionFlagsOn: Automation flags: all on — still not autonomous; ops + policy sign-off required
setup.safetySummaryBody1: Lễ Tân AI supports multilingual intake and draft requests in demo/pilot. It is not autonomous production calling, Twilio production, or instant fulfillment.
setup.safetySummaryBody2: Merchant or manual ops confirmation is required before any appointment, payment, inventory change, or bill is treated as final.
setup.productionGateBody: Do not treat live autonomous booking, inventory updates, bill printing, or payment capture as production until setup, policy, and ops approvals explicitly allow it.

demo.selectIndustryPrompt: Select an industry so Lễ Tân AI understands your context.
demo.safetyNoRealCall: No real phone call is placed from this screen.
demo.safetyNoBookingFinal: No booking or payment is finalized here.
demo.safetyMerchantConfirm: Merchant or manual ops must confirm any real appointment.
demo.safetyNoLiveModel: No live production AI tool action is invoked from this screen.
demo.draftFooterNote: No payment taken. No calendar/provider booking finalized.
demo.transcriptDemoNote: Demo note: conversation preview only. No backend action is performed.
demo.draftNotInSystem: Safety: this draft is not created in any production system.

pilot.statusLabel: Pilot / demo — not production autonomous receptionist
pilot.manualOpsRequired: Manual operations review is required before any outbound call automation or production routing.
pilot.noPayment: No payment is taken by Lễ Tân AI in pilot/demo surfaces.
pilot.noAutoBooking: AI does not autonomously confirm bookings — humans or merchant workflow must confirm.
pilot.noInventoryChange: AI does not modify live inventory in pilot/demo.
pilot.noBillPrinting: AI does not print or finalize bills in pilot/demo.
pilot.consentRequired: Pilot participation requires explicit consent and data-use acknowledgement.
pilot.requestCaptured: Request captured as a draft or lead — not a confirmed paid appointment.
pilot.merchantMustConfirm: Merchant or manual ops must confirm before any appointment is final.
pilot.languageContext: Smart Trio preview — customer {{customer}}, merchant {{merchant}}, native {{native}}

acknowledgement.manualOps: I acknowledge manual ops must approve before pilot activation.
acknowledgement.noAutonomous: I acknowledge the AI will not autonomously finalize bookings, payments, inventory, or bills in pilot.

automation.auto_booking_later: Auto booking later (not enabled in pilot)

pilot.safetyBody1: This does not activate production phone automation or Twilio production.
pilot.safetyBody2: No payment is taken from this form.
pilot.safetyBody3: VIONA manual ops reviews every pilot request.
pilot.safetyBody4: AI may make mistakes; merchant confirmation is required for real appointments.
pilot.privacyCopy1: By submitting, you agree VIONA may contact you about the AI Receptionist pilot evaluation.
pilot.privacyCopy2: This request does not start production AI phone calls.
pilot.privacyCopy5: No real outbound call is placed from this form.
pilot.privacyCopy6: Data is used only for pilot eligibility and onboarding readiness.
pilot.consentLabel: I agree to pilot lead evaluation and privacy terms.
pilot.consentError: Please accept consent to submit this pilot request.
pilot.confirmTitle: Pilot request sent for manual review.
pilot.confirmBody: VIONA team will review before any pilot activation or telephony.
pilot.draftBody1: Consent was recorded for this attempt.
pilot.draftBody2: Relay is unavailable — your draft stays on device.
pilot.draftBody3: No pilot activation happened from this draft.
pilot.errorContactRequired: Please provide at least a contact phone or contact email.
pilot.errorMissedCallsInvalid: Estimated missed calls per day must be a valid number (1–4 digits).
pilot.errorRelayNotConfigured: Pilot request relay is not configured yet. Your draft remains local.
pilot.errorReviewFields: Please review your pilot request fields and try again.
pilot.errorSession: Your session is invalid or expired. Please sign in again.
pilot.errorUnreachable: Could not send request. Your draft is still local.
pilot.errorSendFailed: Could not send request. Your draft is still local.
pilot.languageExpectationsBody: These legs reflect the on-device Smart Trio preview for this session — not saved to your account until a pilot is approved separately.

guard.noUnlimitedAi: No unlimited AI — usage is capped by policy.
guard.pilotUsageCapped: Pilot and demo usage is capped; metering is enforced server-side when enabled.
guard.autoPause: At-policy auto-pause prevents runaway provider spend when metering is wired.
guard.manualApproval: Raising caps or enabling production AI/voice routes requires manual ops approval.
guard.costFirewallHint: Pilot usage is capped. No unlimited AI. Manual ops required for production routes.

notes.seeRunbook: See docs/ops/VIONA_AI_COST_FIREWALL_RUNBOOK.md for caps and incident response.

preview.title: AI usage metering — evidence preview
preview.subtitle: Pack U fixtures vs cost guard registry (no provider calls, no DB).
preview.evidenceOnly: Evidence only — not live tenant usage.
preview.noProviderCalls: No OpenAI, Gemini, or Twilio requests are made from this panel.
preview.mismatch: Warning: actual verdict differs from fixture expectation — investigate meter or fixture drift.

preview.title: Auto-pause enforcement (dry-run recommendation)
preview.dryRun: Dry-run only — no production gateway pause or block is executed from the app.

policy.defaultNotes: Default policy is dry-run with human approval required before any future enforced pause.

action.pauseFeature: Pause feature (enforced mode only, when explicitly allowed)
action.blockRequest: Block request (enforced mode only, when explicitly allowed)

preview.title: Admin alert (dry-run)
preview.subtitle: No email, Slack, SMS, or push is sent from this preview.
preview.previewOnly: Preview only — not a live incident or notification record.
preview.productionSendDisabled: Production notification delivery: disabled (always in this pack).
preview.incidentLog: Requires incident log (when enabled in a future pack)

body.usageWithinPolicy: Meter verdict is allow; no admin escalation required in dry-run.
body.usageWarn: Meter verdict is warn; ops should review usage, margin, or unit mismatch.
body.marginWarn: Negative or risky margin signal; finance should review pricing vs provider cost.
body.autoPauseRisk: Meter recommends auto-pause path; requires owner approval before any enforced pause.
body.blocked: Request would be blocked by guard (e.g. frozen feature or missing configuration).

preview.title: Incident log (dry-run acknowledgement)
preview.subtitle: Design-only projection — no DB rows, tickets, or outbound messages.
preview.previewOnly: Preview only — not persisted as a production incident.
preview.nextStatus: Simulated next status if acknowledged in a future system
preview.runbookNotes: See docs/ops/VIONA_INCIDENT_DRY_RUN_RUNBOOK.md before enabling real incident logging or notifications.

sandbox.statusLabel: Telephony: sandbox / manual ops readiness — not production calling
sandbox.productionDisabled: Production outbound calling stays disabled until a separate approval gate.
sandbox.consentRequired: Explicit consent is required before any real handset dial or recording.
sandbox.recordingDisclosure: If recording is ever enabled, disclosure and lawful basis must be approved first.
sandbox.costCapped: Voice and AI call paths must follow the AI cost firewall — no unlimited minutes.
sandbox.manualOpsFallback: Manual ops callback is the safe default when automated voice is not approved.
sandbox.phonePilotFootnote: Phone calling is sandbox or manual-ops only. Production calls are disabled in this pilot lane.

feature.b2cAiCallAssistantSandbox: B2C AI call assistant — sandbox lane (outbound gated)
feature.liveInterpreterVoiceBridge: Live interpreter / voice bridge — manual ops; production frozen

switcher.title: Language & market
switcher.subtitle: On-device Smart Trio preview — not saved to your account or servers.
switcher.localOnlyNotice: Selections stay on this device for this session. They do not change your profile country or run global app language switching.
